name: k6-ui-performance-framework
description: K6 TypeScript UI performance framework with reusable browser journeys and load profiles

scripts.smokeTest: npm run build && k6 run dist/simulations/todoMvcSimulation.js -e ENV=dev -e LOAD_PROFILE=fixed -e USERS=1 -e DURATION_SECONDS=30
scripts.rampTest: npm run build && k6 run dist/simulations/todoMvcSimulation.js -e ENV=qa -e LOAD_PROFILE=ramp-up -e USERS=20 -e DURATION_SECONDS=180
scripts.spikeTest: npm run build && k6 run dist/simulations/todoMvcSimulation.js -e ENV=prod -e LOAD_PROFILE=spike -e USERS=40 -e DURATION_SECONDS=120
scripts.peakTest: npm run build && k6 run dist/simulations/todoMvcSimulation.js -e ENV=prod -e LOAD_PROFILE=peak -e USERS=30 -e DURATION_SECONDS=240
